name: J&J SNACK FOODS CORP
summary: J&J Snack Foods Corp. manufactures snack foods and distributes frozen beverages to the foodservice and retail supermarket industries. Key products include soft pretzels (SUPERPRETZEL, BRAUHAUS), frozen novelties (DIPPIN DOTS, LUIGIS, WHOLE FRUIT, ICEE), churros (HOLA!), bakery products (READI-BAKE, DADDY RAYS, HILL & VALLEY), and frozen beverages (ICEE, SLUSH PUPPIE, PARROT ICE). The company operates in three segments: Food Service, Retail Supermarkets, and Frozen Beverages, serving customers across the U.S., Mexico, and Canada.
